unique_mechanism: the loom split - deterministic template swapping named entities and differentiators for typed placeholders, with a signed local receipt
target_market: solo developers and 2-5 person startups pre-launch, especially competitive niches like AI writing tools and dev productivity
pricing: free local tool; USD 9/month per seat team policy pack; USD 490/year founder bundle
gtm_detail: GitHub open-source launch, then paid policy pack; first 100 users from the IndieHackers building-in-public-quietly thread
moat: the verifiable signed receipt of what left the machine - competitors only do redaction
founder_notes: do not mention the Quietloom name or the loom-split mechanism publicly until the provisional filing is drafted
